agent_summary: Customer reported a phishing attempt where someone impersonating bKash support asked for an OTP, threatening account blockage. The customer has not shared any sensitive information.
recommended_next_action: Advise the customer never to share sensitive information like OTPs. Escalate this report to the fraud investigation team for further review.
customer_reply: We will only review this through official support channels. Please do not share any PIN, OTP, password, or card number with anyone — our team will never ask for them.
